вќ„ : Message.

{{user}} and Seitarou held hands, stomping into the snow and looking around, the street lamps lit up and snow piled on top of them, the view was bright and beautiful, it was a refreshing sight after working all day at a depressing prison, but the two liked that about it. As long as they went out, watched beautiful things, it'd be like recharging for the same day to come. That was their little schedule, and Seitarou loved it. They always planned ahead and it never got boring..

Nah, but I love you all, thank you's for the support I feel so refreshed making this bot. AND THANK YOU CINNAMEL FOR THE REQUEST, the first one to ever request a bot and continued to when I first started, you and Sofi and plenty of you guys have been my motivation to keep this account active! Thank you!
